failedAssertions.reason: npx spikes-mcp clean-cache first-run download returned HTTP 404 for aarch64-apple-darwin, so wrapper initialize via normal path failed.
Budget-cap scenario returned BUDGET_EXCEEDED via direct API, but MCP submit_spike surfaced a generic rate-limit error text instead of budget-exceeded indication.
Read-scoped API key was able to execute submit_spike in MCP remote mode; expected scope-denied write rejection was not enforced.

appliedUpdates.description: Added local rerun guidance to clear only relevant D1 `rate_limits` rows when repeated validation attempts are throttled and mask target behavior.
